verification_steps_post_revision: Open revised artifact and confirm changes satisfy acceptance criteria.
Run deterministic precheck again to ensure artifact path and presence unchanged.
Have a human verifier confirm the final decision table and sensitivity appendix.
Open revised artifact and confirm changes satisfy acceptance criteria.
Run deterministic precheck again to ensure artifact path and presence unchanged.
Have a human verifier confirm the final decision table and sensitivity appendix.

acceptance_criteria: Final decision table is present and formatted as a clear table with one row per lot.
Sensitivity appendix exists and documents plausible uncertainty ranges and a small-step sensitivity table.
planned_changes.description: Open the full etch_drift_report.md and confirm the presence and formatting of the final decision table and the sensitivity appendix. If either is missing or incomplete, add the missing table(s).

acceptance_criteria: No remaining instances of 'particles' as a field name; a schema note documents alias mapping.
Units are explicit for each metric in the schema note.
planned_changes.description: Normalize metric field names across the report (use 'particle_count' consistently) and add a one-line schema note listing any accepted aliases and units.

acceptance_criteria: Sensitivity table includes at least two uncertainty scenarios and indicates resulting trigger counts per lot.
Text explains how to interpret sensitivity results for decision-making.
planned_changes.description: Add an explicit small-step sensitivity table showing how defined uncertainty bands (e.g., yield +/-1 pp and +/-2 pp; particle_count +/-1 and +/-5; overlay +/-0.2 nm and +/-1.0 nm) affect trigger status for each lot, with emphasis on marginal L3.

acceptance_criteria: Each lot row lists owner, priority, deadline, and acceptance criteria.
L2 row includes an explicit immediate action (e.g., metrology recheck within 24 hours) and senior review within 48 hours.
planned_changes.description: Revise the final decision table to include for each lot: exact packet field citation, recommendation, next-step owner (role), priority, time-bound action (deadline), and acceptance criteria to clear holds.

acceptance_criteria: Verifier note is present and documents who confirmed the embedded tables and when.
planned_changes.description: Add a short verifier note at the top of the artifact indicating that the full report has been inspected (date/time, inspector initials) to close the preview-truncation gap for operational readers.

metadata_json.revision_goal: The baseline report is present and well-structured: data extraction, arithmetic, trigger-application, and conservative recommendations are correctly represented in the artifact preview. The only substantive concern is that the grader inferred the presence/formatting of an embedded final decision table and a complete sensitivity appendix from a truncated preview; a human should open the full artifact to confirm those embedded tables. Minor improvements would increase operational usability (standardize field names/aliases, add explicit small-step sensitivity checks for near-threshold lots, and make next steps time-bound and owner-assigned).
